dag_desc: Fix 6 pipeline issues from hardening-004 session: DAG-scoped completion, agent retry noise, artifact status command, evidence branch awareness, compile_hash self-reference, parallel edit safety

tasks.desc: Scope completion receipts by dag_id. completed.json entries must include dagId field. orient() should only count receipts matching current head.json dag id. Old receipts from prior DAGs are ignored (not deleted). saveCompletionWithEvidence writes dagId from current head.json.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: completion receipts are scoped by dagId — orient ignores receipts from other DAGs, no cross-DAG leakage

tasks.desc: When pre-commit or commit-msg hook fails and agent retries, the duplicate commits create noise. Add a git helper that checks if HEAD already contains the same tree diff before committing — if so, skip the commit and return success. Export as deduplicatedCommit(message, files) from a new module.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: deduplicatedCommit skips commit when HEAD already has identical changes — prevents retry noise

tasks.desc: Add 'roadmap status' command: for each node in current batch, show { nodeId, produces, producesExist (bool per file), hasReceipt (bool), validators (count) }. Quick artifact check without running advance. Wire into CLI router + api registry.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: roadmap status shows per-node artifact existence and receipt status for current batch — no side effects

tasks.desc: saveCompletionWithEvidence should record the branch name in the receipt. advanceNode on a feature branch writes evidence to .roadmap/completed.json on that branch. After merge to main, receipts are available. orient reads receipts from the current branch's completed.json — no merge needed to see evidence.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: completion receipts include branch field — evidence is written wherever advance runs, merges naturally via git

tasks.desc: Eliminate the compile_hash circular dependency. If metadata.compile_hash is missing or the literal string 'auto', make computes it as sha256(JSON.stringify(tasks)) — hashing the tasks array, not the whole spec file. This is stable (tasks don't change when compile_hash changes) and removes the two-step dance.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: compile_hash='auto' or missing → computed from sha256(tasks JSON) — no circular dependency, single-step spec creation

tasks.desc: When multiple agents share a branch, git auto-merge can silently combine their changes. Add a pre-advance check: if completed.json shows another agent advanced a different node within the last 60s on the same branch, emit a warning about potential merge conflicts. Also document the worktree protocol as the recommended pattern for parallel agents.

validate.statement: Plan clarity: advance warns when concurrent agents share a branch — nudges toward worktree isolation

tasks.desc: Integration: all 6 pipeline fixes verified. Completion is DAG-scoped, retries are deduped, status command works, evidence records branch, compile_hash is auto-computable, parallel edits warn.

validate.statement: All 6 pipeline issues resolved — completion is DAG-scoped, agents don't create retry noise, status shows artifact state, evidence is branch-aware, compile_hash has no circular dep, parallel edits are guarded
